name: Corn Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, heat evaporated milk uncovered in Microwave Oven for 2 1/2 minutes or until scalded. Add butter and stir until melted.
2. Stir in eggs, sugar, salt, and pepper. Blend well.
3. Stir in corn.
4. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven for 14 minutes.
5. Set aside for 5 minutes to finish cooking.
